generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed - our NATO allies are finally stepping up! Last quarter, they covered 42% of collective defense costs, up from 32% last year. Meanwhile, some politicians want to cut our commitments, saying we're carrying too much burden. But look at the facts: when allies contribute more, we all benefit from stronger deterrence. Why risk our security by pulling back now? #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurity
